Specification: HMI shall provide recipes, alarms, diagnostics, and e-stop indicators.
The system shall provide recipe management for at least 50 recipes and retain alarm history for 30 days.
Maintain alignment within 0.5 mm and provide guarding that meets ISO 14120; safe torque off must be integrated.
EOAT shall withstand 40 lb payload with safety factor 4:1.
FAT shall occur in week 14 with customer witness; payment milestones 30/30/30/10 tied to FAT, SAT, shipment, acceptance.
